text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa has finished up today's training.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a ton! Now I can really get the sweat
going!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do some more trainin' on my own!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My papa always says the most important part of
getting stronger is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I gotta train even harder!
choice_data_list: When you put it like that, I've got to join you!
In that case, you should get some rest.
In that case, you should get some rest.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I gotta train even harder!
choice_data_list: When you put it like that, I've got to join you!
In that case, you should get some rest.
In that case, you should get some rest.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I knew you had the same passion as I do
runnin' through your veins!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get as fired up as the red-hot
evening sun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We do some additional training until the sun goes
down.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! But I don't wanna take a break!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get faster... faster! And I can't do that
without training!
choice_data_list:
Doesn't that mean that taking a break is the
most difficult path for you right now?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Well, if I'm gonna keep walkin' the most
difficult path...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, understood! I'll take a break!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is what I have to do to spread my wings for
the world!
